channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Irish Actor Gary Lydon Passes Away Aged 61, Tributes from Fans and Colleagues
item.description: Irish actor Gary Lydon, recognised for his work in The Banshees of Inisherin, War Horse, and Brooklyn, has died suddenly at the age of 61. Born in London in 1964, Lydon moved to Wexford, Ireland, at t...

item.title: Potential Global Oil Crisis and South Africa’s Economic Risks Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran, instigated by former President Trump under influence from Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, is creating significant global economic uncertainty...

item.title: Congress Raises Concerns on Great Nicobar Island Project Following Rahul Gandhi’s Visit
item.description: The Congress party has raised serious concerns regarding the Great Nicobar Island Development Project, following Rahul Gandhi’s visit to the island on April 28, 2026. Party general secretary Jairam Ra...

item.title: Calls Grow for Deportation of Undocumented Migrants Amid Protests in South Africa
item.description: Amid rising tensions in South Africa over the issue of undocumented migrants, the activist group Citizens Forum has called for the immediate deportation of foreign nationals without proper documentati...

item.title: Antonelli wins chaotic Miami Grand Prix as McLaren shows strong improvement
item.description: Formula 1 returned to Miami after a five-week break with a dramatic and rain-affected race that delivered both chaos and standout performances. Italian teenager Kimi Antonelli continued his remarkable...

item.title: House Committee to Adopt Impeachment Report Against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The House Committee on Justice is set to formally adopt its report finding probable cause to impeach Vice President Sara Duterte. This move paves the way for the transmission of the Articles of Impeac...

item.title: Experts recommend reducing GST on milk to support child nutrition and dairy sector growth
item.description: During a pre-budget consultation on dairy sector reforms, stakeholders emphasised the need for reducing general sales tax (GST) on milk, citing its critical role in child development and public health...

item.title: Global edtech investment declines sharply as focus shifts to AI and workforce training
item.description: Global investment in edtech has witnessed a steep decline after peaking during the Covid-19 pandemic, when lockdowns pushed millions of students towards online learning. Funding reached around $16.7 b...

item.title: Three People Die in Suspected Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
item.description: A suspected outbreak of hantavirus aboard the Dutch-flagged cruise ship MV Hondius in the Atlantic Ocean has resulted in three deaths and at least three illnesses, according to the World Health Organi...

item.title: Jay Sonza’s legal team files motion to dismiss case, disputes court jurisdiction in Pasay
item.description: Jay Sonza's legal team has filed a motion requesting the dismissal of the case filed against him, raising concerns over the jurisdiction of the Pasay City court. The move comes as part of the initial ...

item.title: Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso Defect to Nigeria Democratic Congress, Urge Unity Within Party
item.description: Former presidential candidates Peter Obi and Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso don officially join the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), as dem collect their membership cards for the party headquarters on Sunday ...

item.title: Former New York Mayor Rudy Giuliani in Critical but Stable Condition in Hospital
item.description: Rudolph Giuliani, former Mayor of New York City and ex-adviser to Donald Trump, is reported to be in critical but stable condition at a hospital, according to his spokesperson, Ted Goodman. The 81-yea...

item.title: U.S. Secretary of State Rubio Plans Meetings in Rome Amid Tensions Between Trump and Pope Leo
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to meet Pope Leo during a trip to Rome this week, following a recent public dispute between the pontiff and former President Donald Trump. Rubio's visi...

item.title: Ebonyi Governor Reinstates Most Suspended Officials, Excluding Ministry of Lands
item.description: Ebonyi State Governor, Francis Nwifuru, don recall almost all suspended government officials for the state, but those wey dey Ministry of Lands still dey under investigation no follow join. Na during ...

item.title: Trump administration to renovate East Potomac Golf Links in Washington, D.C.
item.description: The Trump administration has announced plans to renovate the East Potomac Golf Links, Washington D.C.’s busiest public golf course. Work is expected to start on landscaping, deferred maintenance, and ...

item.title: Jemima Goldsmith Engaged to Cameron O'Reilly After Over a Year of Relationship
item.description: Jemima Goldsmith, the British social activist and ex-wife of Imran Khan, is reportedly set to remarry. The 52-year-old is engaged to Irish-Australian financier Cameron O'Reilly, who is 62 years old. T...

item.title: Karnataka’s Revised Scheduled Caste Quota Faces Objections from Communities
item.description: In Karnataka, several communities have voiced objections to the state government’s recently revised policy on internal reservation for Scheduled Castes. The new arrangement merges nomadic and semi-nom...

item.title: Inside Khayelitsha’s Mteto’s Child Villa: Contemporary Luxury in the Township
item.description: Khayelitsha, Cape Town’s largest township, now has a new upmarket accommodation option with the opening of Mteto’s Child Villa. Owned by local entrepreneur Luzuko Mteto, the villa offers five suites, ...

item.title: Vote Counting Begins for 2026 Assembly Elections and Bypolls
item.description: Today, May 4, 2026, marks a pivotal day for Indian democracy as the counting of votes commences for several crucial assembly elections and by-elections. The nation is closely monitoring the results fo...

item.title: New Keytruda Injection Set to Reduce Hospital Time for Cancer Patients
item.description: A new injectable form of the immunotherapy drug Keytruda is set to significantly reduce the time NHS cancer patients spend in hospital. Traditionally administered via an intravenous drip taking over a...
